name: Diana Mundi

find.name: Justin
find.why: You and Justin share a passion for environmental justice organizing, which makes him a fantastic person for you to connect with.

find.name: Edith Chang
find.why: You should meet Edith Chang because her innovative ideas about creativity could inspire you to change what's possible for people in remarkable ways.
find.match_belief: Visibility shifts when the people affected become the storytellers instead of the story. That's all power.

profile.belief: Revelation happens when you show what's been true all along. Then power has nowhere left to hide.
profile.working_on: Assembling detailed maps of industrial pollution plumes so a neighborhood has proof, coordinates, and standing to sue the source.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a profound desire to empower the vulnerable, revealing hidden truths that demand accountability and justice for affected communities.
